title: Orchid (Font)
body:
# Orchid
Orchid is a thick, stylized font utilizing antialiasing, named with regard to it's planned use in my upcoming mod _Inflorescence_.
## Gallery
![All the font's notable characters, including uppercase & lowercase A-Z, all digits, and a few of the special characters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a398836e6416132a73abb58c886c82f63a36f012.png)
![My personal favorite and/or personally stylized characters from the pack, from left to right: Zz 7 $ 2 W](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a81d85696d6f5cd15659069f98c0051a24a2c48c.png)
## Compatibility
- The **Made for a newer/older version of minecraft** warning can be ignored in most cases
- The pack has been tested for 1.21.11, 1.21.10, 1.21.4, and 1.20.1. Other listed versions have not been directly confirmed to be compatible but are assumed to function based on minecraft's asset history.
